rulings.Case Title: DOROTHY TILLMAN et al VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Directing San Francisco Sheriffs Department To Enforce The Writ Of Possession For The Premises At 1139 Market Street # 228 In San Francisco, Ca
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 20, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANTS BALWANTSINH THAKOR and SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN's Motion For Order Directing San Francisco Sheriffs Department To Enforce The Writ Of Possession For The Premises At 1139 Market Street # 228 In San Francisco, Ca OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Also, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers. Finally, there are two contradicting proofs of service (#1 attached to the Notice of Motion and #2 attached to the Points and Authorities). Proof of Service #2 is singed under penalty of perjury on October 21, 2015 declaring that the papers were served on October 26, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BENJAMIN SALTHOUSE VS. KAUSHIK DATTANI et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 20, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT MAVERICK RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC's A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. 1.As to Dattani: In this consolidated action the claims by Dattani against the moving party include claims made in case 537353 and 543635. The Notice of Motion and the Separate Statement indicates that this motion is only made as to 543635, and therefore does not dispose of all the claims in this consolidated action. (See CCP 437c(a)). To the extent the moving party purports that this is a motion for summary adjudication, moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Therefore, the motion for summary judgment/adjudication is denied as to Dattani. 2.As to American Western: Even though moving party has shown that Dattani could have waived American Western rights pursuant to the contract between First Republic and American Western, moving party failed to shift its burden and show that Dattani in fact did waive either First Republic's and/or American Western's rights based on the language in the Lease. = (501/REQ)
